name: Grilled Chicken Dijonnais
recipeIngredient: 6 Chicken breast halves, skinned and boned
recipeInstructions:
1. In a shallow dish, combine oil, lemon juice, and ground pepper.
2. Add the chicken breasts to the mixture and coat them evenly. Cover with plastic wrap and refrigerate for 30 minutes to marinate.
3. Meanwhile, in a small saucepan, combine vinegar and white wine. Cook over medium-high heat until the liquid reduces to about 2 tablespoons. Remove from heat and stir in dried tarragon and white pepper.
4. Add butter to the mixture one tablespoon at a time, whisking thoroughly after each addition. Continue cooking over low heat until the sauce thickens slightly. Stir in the dijon mustard.
5. Preheat the charcoal grill to medium-high heat.
6. Drain the chicken of excess marinade, then grill for 3-4 minutes on each side.
7. Transfer the grilled chicken to a heated platter. Garnish with lemon slices and parsley. Serve the sauce separately.
